{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Restaurant Manager",
  "description": "Sweet Sensations Confectionery Limited is a reputable Quick Service Restaurant (QSR) with multiple outlets across Lagos is seeking experienced and passionate Restaurant Managers to join our growing team. The ideal candidates must be customer-focused, operationally sound, and capable of leading high-performing teams.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Restaurant Manager

Job Locations&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Oversee daily restaurant operations across front and back-of-house
	Ensure delivery of excellent customer service and satisfaction
	Implement customer loyalty and retention initiatives
	Develop and drive restaurant-level marketing activities
	Handle customer inquiries, concerns, and complaints professionally
	Organize and supervise staff shifts
	Lead, coach, train, and evaluate restaurant team members
	Manage inventory, forecast needs, and ensure availability of supplies
	Minimize waste and maintain cost control measures
	Ensure a clean, safe, and positive working environment
	Monitor operations, identify gaps, and implement corrective actions
	Introduce innovative strategies to boost productivity and sales.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	B.Sc. or HND in related fields.
	Strong analytical and numerical abilities
	Prior experience in customer service
	Experience as a Restaurant Manager or in a similar role is an added advantage
	Good understanding of food and restaurant operations
	Excellent leadership, motivational, and people management skills
	Sound financial management and reporting abilities
	Strong interpersonal and communication skills.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to:&nbsp;career@sweetsensation.ng&nbsp;with &ldquo;Restaurant Manager&rdquo; as the subject of the email.

Important Note


	Preference will be given to qualified candidates who reside in Yaba, Iyana-Oworo, Gbagada, Alagomeji, Ifako, Surulere, Victoria Island, Ikoyi and Ojota.
	Proximity to these locations is a significant advantage due to operational requirements and ease of commute.

Restaurant Manager Job at Sweet Sensations Confectionery Limited




        
    

        
        Sweet Sensations Confectionery Limited is a reputable Quick Service Restaurant (QSR) with multiple outlets across Lagos is seeking experienced and passionate Restaurant Managers to join our growing team. The ideal candidates must be customer-focused, operationally sound, and capable of leading high-performing teams.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Restaurant Manager

Job Locations Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Oversee daily restaurant operations across front and back-of-house
	Ensure delivery of excellent customer service and satisfaction
	Implement customer loyalty and retention initiatives
	Develop and drive restaurant-level marketing activities
	Handle customer inquiries, concerns, and complaints professionally
	Organize and supervise staff shifts
	Lead, coach, train, and evaluate restaurant team members
	Manage inventory, forecast needs, and ensure availability of supplies
	Minimize waste and maintain cost control measures
	Ensure a clean, safe, and positive working environment
	Monitor operations, identify gaps, and implement corrective actions
	Introduce innovative strategies to boost productivity and sales.


Requirements & Qualifications


	B.Sc. or HND in related fields.
	Strong analytical and numerical abilities
	Prior experience in customer service
	Experience as a Restaurant Manager or in a similar role is an added advantage
	Good understanding of food and restaurant operations
	Excellent leadership, motivational, and people management skills
	Sound financial management and reporting abilities
	Strong interpersonal and communication skills.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to: career@sweetsensation.ng with “Restaurant Manager” as the subject of the email.

Important Note


	Preference will be given to qualified candidates who reside in Yaba, Iyana-Oworo, Gbagada, Alagomeji, Ifako, Surulere, Victoria Island, Ikoyi and Ojota.
	Proximity to these locations is a significant advantage due to operational requirements and ease of commute.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

With a strong focus on innovation, efficiency, and excellence, we have established ourselves as a trusted name in the industry.

Our company operates across multiple locations, ensuring seamless production and service delivery while upholding the highest standards of professionalism. We value teamwork, integrity, and continuous growth, providing our employees with opportunities to excel in their careers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Administrative Officer
Job Location:&nbsp;Agbor, Delta
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Record daily sales and transactions
	Prepare basic sales reports
	Assist with customer follow-ups
	Maintain accurate records.


Requirements


	Must be literate (able to read and write)
	Must know how to operate a system/computer
	Must be familiar with sales documentation and record keeping
	Good communication and organizational skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@runola.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Sales Administrative Officer Job at Runola Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Runola is a parent company with four subsidiaries (AdelooSuites, Runoplast, Runoclean, and RunoFeed)committed to delivering high-quality products and services to our customers. With a strong focus on innovation, efficiency, and excellence, we have established ourselves as a trusted name in the industry.

Our company operates across multiple locations, ensuring seamless production and service delivery while upholding the highest standards of professionalism. We value teamwork, integrity, and continuous growth, providing our employees with opportunities to excel in their careers.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Administrative Officer
Job Location: Agbor, Delta
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Record daily sales and transactions
	Prepare basic sales reports
	Assist with customer follow-ups
	Maintain accurate records.


Requirements


	Must be literate (able to read and write)
	Must know how to operate a system/computer
	Must be familiar with sales documentation and record keeping
	Good communication and organizational skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@runola.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more enquires call or text; 07016549893.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Junior Accountant",
  "description": "Maurice Xandra Solutions Limited is a management consulting company that renders quality services in Human Resource, Management and Process improvement. MXS Limited was set up to provide high quality, up to date training, team management and process improvement services for its clients.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Junior Accountant

Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers

Job Summary


	Our client is seeking an experienced Junior Accountant to support core accounting and financial control functions within our oil and gas operations. The candidate will be responsible for financial reporting, cost control, reconciliations, tax compliance, and supporting audit processes in a structured and compliance-driven environment.


Responsibilities


	Maintain accurate general ledger accounts and post journal entries
	Prepare monthly management accounts and supporting schedules
	Perform bank, vendor, and intercompany reconciliations
	Manage accounts payable and receivable processes
	Monitor operational expenses and support CAPEX/OPEX tracking
	Assist in budget preparation and variance analysis
	Compute and process VAT, WHT, PAYE, and other statutory remittances
	Support internal and external audits by providing required documentation
	Ensure compliance with IFRS and Nigerian financial regulations
	Maintain proper documentation in line with internal control policies


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related discipline
	Minimum of 4 years of accounting experience
	Strong knowledge of Nigerian tax laws and financial reporting standards
	Proficiency in ERP/accounting software (SAP, Sage, QuickBooks, or similar)
	Advanced Microsoft Excel skills
	Associate Chartered Accountant (ACA) &ndash; ICAN certification required
	High level of integrity, accuracy, and attention to detail


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hr@mauricexandra.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-03",

Junior Accountant Job at Maurice Xandra Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        Maurice Xandra Solutions Limited is a management consulting company that renders quality services in Human Resource, Management and Process improvement. MXS Limited was set up to provide high quality, up to date training, team management and process improvement services for its clients.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Junior Accountant

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Our client is seeking an experienced Junior Accountant to support core accounting and financial control functions within our oil and gas operations. The candidate will be responsible for financial reporting, cost control, reconciliations, tax compliance, and supporting audit processes in a structured and compliance-driven environment.


Responsibilities


	Maintain accurate general ledger accounts and post journal entries
	Prepare monthly management accounts and supporting schedules
	Perform bank, vendor, and intercompany reconciliations
	Manage accounts payable and receivable processes
	Monitor operational expenses and support CAPEX/OPEX tracking
	Assist in budget preparation and variance analysis
	Compute and process VAT, WHT, PAYE, and other statutory remittances
	Support internal and external audits by providing required documentation
	Ensure compliance with IFRS and Nigerian financial regulations
	Maintain proper documentation in line with internal control policies


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related discipline
	Minimum of 4 years of accounting experience
	Strong knowledge of Nigerian tax laws and financial reporting standards
	Proficiency in ERP/accounting software (SAP, Sage, QuickBooks, or similar)
	Advanced Microsoft Excel skills
	Associate Chartered Accountant (ACA) – ICAN certification required
	High level of integrity, accuracy, and attention to detail


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hr@mauricexandra.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Maurice Xandra Solutions Limited is a management consulting company that renders quality services in Human Resource, Management and Process improvement. MXS Limited was set up to provide high quality, up to date training, team management and process improvement services for its clients.



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Head, Financial Control

Job Location:&nbsp;Anambra



Job Summary


	The Chief Financial Officer (CFO) is the strategic architect of the company&#39;s future.
	The CFO is responsible for ensuring the company has the capital to grow, the resilience to survive market volatility, and a clear path to long-term profitability.


Responsibilities
Strategic Financial Planning &amp; Capital Allocation:


	Evaluate expansion strategies
	Determine the capital structure of the organization to fund operations while minimizing the cost of capital.
	Appraising and approving large-scale Capital Expenditure (CAPEX) for capacity and business expansion.


Risk Management &amp; Hedging:


	Commodity hedging, through managing the risk of price spikes in raw materials (e.g., copper, aluminum, and compounds) using financial derivatives, forecasting, and forward contracts.


Requirements


	8 to 10 years in senior finance roles (e.g., Financial Controller, Finance Director, or Head of Finance).
	Professional Certifications: ACCA, CPA (Certified Public Accountant), CMA (Certified Management Accountant).




Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hr@mauricexandra.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Head, Financial Control Job at Maurice Xandra Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        Maurice Xandra Solutions Limited is a management consulting company that renders quality services in Human Resource, Management and Process improvement. MXS Limited was set up to provide high quality, up to date training, team management and process improvement services for its clients.



We are recruiting to fill the position below:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Position: Head, Financial Control

Job Location: Anambra



Job Summary


	The Chief Financial Officer (CFO) is the strategic architect of the company's future.
	The CFO is responsible for ensuring the company has the capital to grow, the resilience to survive market volatility, and a clear path to long-term profitability.


Responsibilities
Strategic Financial Planning & Capital Allocation:


	Evaluate expansion strategies
	Determine the capital structure of the organization to fund operations while minimizing the cost of capital.
	Appraising and approving large-scale Capital Expenditure (CAPEX) for capacity and business expansion.


Risk Management & Hedging:


	Commodity hedging, through managing the risk of price spikes in raw materials (e.g., copper, aluminum, and compounds) using financial derivatives, forecasting, and forward contracts.


Requirements


	8 to 10 years in senior finance roles (e.g., Financial Controller, Finance Director, or Head of Finance).
	Professional Certifications: ACCA, CPA (Certified Public Accountant), CMA (Certified Management Accountant).




Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hr@mauricexandra.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
